_comment_top: Branch-protection payload for KooshaPari/phenotype-infra:master. Apply via: gh api --method PUT /repos/KooshaPari/phenotype-infra/branches/master/protection --input .github/protection/master.json. Human-readable narrative: docs/governance/branch-protection-policy.md.
_comment_status_checks: Job names below must match the `name:` (or `jobs.<id>.name:`) keys in each .github/workflows/*.yml file exactly. Renaming a workflow job breaks protection.
